On.Send: AnimBracketStart Work Stand,Work,Start Stand,Work Stand,Work,End 0 1.750000 AsTimeScale

On.Terms: TimerExpired; TimerName Shadow; IsStatus ShadowCreate 1; !Option Model Low
Effect.NapalmSpraySwarmBeta@Damage.Start; At Target; !ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType NotStructureTarget
Effect.NapalmSpraySwarmBeta@Damage.Start; At Target; !ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType IsStructureTarget
Effect.NapalmSpraySwarmBeta@Damage.Start; At Target; ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType NotStructureTarget
Effect.NapalmSpraySwarmBeta@Damage.Start; At Target; ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType IsStructureTarget

On.Send: AnimBracketStart Morph Morph,Start Morph,Stand Morph,End Instant
AnimBracketStart Morph Morph,Start Morph,Stand Morph,End Instant
AnimBracketStart Phasing Work,Start Work Work,End Instant
AnimBracketStart Work Stand,Work,Start Stand,Work Stand,Work,End ClosingFull
